Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I got smarter after[n]I donated money here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder if the gods helped me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's nothing in particular I[n]want to wish for at the moment.[n]{f 1 1}
